title: GitSetupAuthBootstrapResponse
description: Typed response for broker-owned git provider auth bootstrap.

request_id.description: Stable request correlation identifier echoed from the request.

provider.description: Git provider whose auth bootstrap flow was handled.

mode.description: Broker-owned bootstrap mode used for this response.

status.description: Current bootstrap flow outcome or wait posture.

device_verification_uri.description: Verification URI for device-code style bootstrap when applicable.

device_user_code.description: User code for device-code style bootstrap when applicable.

next_poll_after_seconds.description: Suggested polling delay for headless bootstrap continuation when applicable.

account_state.description: Updated broker-projected provider account state after bootstrap handling.

auth_posture.description: Updated broker-projected auth posture after bootstrap handling.
